testsuite.name: com.example.todolist.ServerTest

testcase.name: POST tasks should create task and return 201
POST auth register should create user and return 201
POST auth register with duplicate email should return 409
GET tasks should return user tasks
POST auth login with wrong password should return 401
POST auth login with valid credentials should return token
